name: 9GAG
description: Operator of an online platform and social media website designed to share user-generated content. The company's online platform and social media website provides comical images that features user-generated videos under categories such as fail and prank, comedy, game, TV and music, providing users with an engagement platform for fun, conversation and connection.

name: Kibin
description: Provider of online proofreading and editing services intended to empower students to become a writer. The company's services streamline the revision process and inspire new ideas and fresh approaches to writing problems as well as provide feedback to students so they can improve their grades and writing skills, enabling students and organizations to elevate their essays with a suite of services and free resources.

name: Pic Collage
description: Developer of a mobile photo application designed to let users combine images, text, and stickers as freeform collages and share them amongst themselves. The company's application lets users search the internet from within the application to find photos, videos, and other images for photo collages in fun and novel ways, enabling users to combine photos, videos, captions, stickers, and special effects to create unique collages and images that they can share with friends.

name: LaunchRock
description: Developer of viral setup launching page. The company provide a platform to incentivize and reward the users for telling others about their projects through email & social networks.

name: ChirpMe
description: Provider of dating platform. The company's platform matches people by hobbies and activities.

name: Storytree
description: Developer of an app designed to make it easy to create photo books. The company's app allows users to pick photos from their mobile phones, cloud storage, and social media and place them in the desired format for printing, helping users create beautiful photo gifts, keepsakes, and custom scrapbooks in minutes.

name: Scoopola
description: Provider of an online ticketing and marketing platform created to revolutionize ticketing, marketing and analytics for live events. The company's Ticketfly platform offers tickets for theaters, billiards and backrooms and factory concert houses as well as analytics and reporting, entry management, support and web design and development services enabling promoters to sell more tickets and streamline operations.

name: Tout
description: Provider of productivity application intended to empower salespeople. The company's software application offers the ability to track email and websites, utilize templates and analytics to enable salespeople to close more deals and increase productivity.

name: Tinfoil Security
description: Developer of website and application programming interface (API) security software designed to make website and mobile security accessible to the world. The company's web application scanner checks website vulnerabilities using automated scan checks and tracks external hackers picking through each access point on the website, enabling developers to identify how to fix vulnerable areas before they get hacked.

name: Daily Gobble
description: Developer of customized loyalty applications designed to connect customers to the brands. The company's holistic technology platform provides a customized mobile applications that offer loyalty, guest feedback, ordering, mobile payment and gift cards which are integrated into the point-of-sale for a seamless in-store execution, enabling brands to better understand and engage with their customers.

name: Launchbit
description: Provider of an advertisement platform for email. The company's model allows advertisers to identify their target demographic and bid on ad impressions in email newsletters.

name: OVIA
description: Provider of a video interviewing platform. The company develops and delivers Web and mobile video interviewing platforms which helps users to manage the applicant selection process with an online video interview application.
